tasks.title: Admin page + magic-link auth
tasks.description: The /admin React island (client:only) and the request-magic-link Netlify Function: email checked against a server-side allowlist, a short-lived HS256 JWT signed and delivered in the magic link. /admin excluded from robots.txt and the sitemap. Auth/request half built (see plan.md status); email delivery still mocked. See ADR 0003.
steps: Remaining: replace the mock email client (netlify/lib) with a real transactional provider.

tasks.title: Admin batch upload + publish function
tasks.description: Stage a batch of Artworks in the browser and publish them as one atomic commit -> one Netlify build, via incremental GitHub blobs + a single tree/commit/ref-update. Create-only. Full design (master/detail UI, form fields, schema drift, image prep, orphan-blob handling, publish speedbump) in ADR 0004 (refines ADR 0003).
steps: Build per ADR 0004. Notable sub-tasks: restructure src/types/images.ts to the Artwork shape; schema drift in src/content.config.ts (drop medium from ceramics, optional on paintings) + render medium only when present in galleries/detail; master/detail form reconciling the MultiImageForm vs stub-MultiImageFormWrapper divergence; JWT-verified blob-staging Function + publish (tree/commit/ref) Function.

tasks.title: Per-Artwork buy button (e-commerce)
tasks.description: Embeddable Stripe/Shopify-style buy button as an island on Artwork detail pages. No standalone Shop page. Operational concerns (one-of-a-kind inventory, fragile shipping, tax) are the real challenge.
